name: init labs, inc
notes: init.inc is init intelligence, inc — an applied research / cognitive systems AI company based in San Francisco. Not to be confused with INIT Innovations in Transportation (initse.com). Domain matches exactly.

name: Sugar Capital
notes: Seed-stage VC investing at intersection of technology and commerce. HQ 220 Halleck St, San Francisco, CA 94129.

name: Charge Ventures
notes: Pre-seed VC firm based in NYC (36 E 12th St, Manhattan). Operates as Charge Ventures / ChargeVC.

name: 500 Startups
notes: Now rebranded as 500 Global. HQ San Francisco, CA. Website 500.co.

name: Dorm Room Fund
source: Wikipedia; Crunchbase; Dorm Room Fund website
notes: Student-run pre-seed fund originally backed by First Round Capital. Founded in Philadelphia; also has offices in Boston/Cambridge, NYC, and San Francisco. Philadelphia listed as primary HQ in most sources.

name: Cornell
notes: Cornell University, private Ivy League research university. Main campus in Ithaca, NY. Also has NYC and Doha campuses.

name: Redpoint
notes: Redpoint Ventures, founded 1999. HQ Menlo Park, CA. Also offices in SF, LA, Beijing, Shanghai.

name: M12
notes: M12 is Microsoft's corporate venture fund. HQ 1355 Market St, San Francisco, CA.

name: Galaxy Digital
notes: Galaxy Digital (TSX: GLXY) is a crypto/digital asset financial services firm. HQ Battery Park City, New York. Acquired galaxy.com domain for $1.8M in 2021; previously galaxydigital.io.

name: Bumble
notes: Bumble Inc. — dating/social networking app. HQ 1105 W 41st St, Austin, TX.

name: Tusk
notes: Tusk Venture Partners — early-stage VC focused on highly regulated markets. HQ 251 Park Ave S, 8th Floor, New York, NY 10010. Founded 2016 by Bradley Tusk.

name: Female Founders Fund
notes: F3 (Female Founders Fund) — NYC-based pre-seed/seed VC investing exclusively in female-founded companies. Founded 2013 by Anu Duggal.
